costs.network_info: Verkkokulut (~{amount} ct/kWh) laskutetaan erikseen verkko-operaattorisi toimesta eikÃĊ niitÃĊ ole sisÃĊllytetty yllÃĊ olevaan.

info.price_exact: Price comes directly from your energy supplier. GO/WAIT/AVOID actions and price breakdown are 100% accurate.
info.price_calibrated: Price is calculated: ENTSO-E wholesale + average supplier markup from similar users. GO/WAIT/AVOID actions are >99% correct. Price breakdown may differ by up to ~1 ct/kWh. Install a price sensor (e.g. Zonneplan, Tibber) for exact prices.
info.price_estimated: Price is estimated based on ENTSO-E wholesale + standard taxes. GO/WAIT/AVOID actions are reliable (relative price differences are correct). Exact amounts may differ.
info.action_exact: Action based on exact supplier price. Accuracy: 100%.
info.action_calibrated: Action based on calibrated price (ENTSO-E + average supplier markup). Accuracy: 99.3% â in 287 of 8,760 hours per year the action may differ, but only when the price is close to the GO/WAIT threshold.
info.action_estimated: Action based on estimated price (ENTSO-E + standard taxes). Accuracy: ~98% â relative price differences between hours are reliable, but exact thresholds may differ.
info.chart_exact:
Chart shows your actual consumer prices.

Calculation:
  wholesale market (per 15 min)
+ Energy tax & surcharges
+ Supplier correction (per-hour delta from crowdsource data)
+ VAT
= Consumer price

The current price is verified against your energy sensor â accuracy: 100%.
info.chart_calibrated:
Chart shows calibrated consumer prices.

Calculation:
  wholesale market (per 15 min)
+ Energy tax & surcharges
+ Average supplier correction ({hours}h of crowdsource data)
+ VAT
= Consumer price

Accuracy: ~99%. Prices may differ up to ~1 ct/kWh from your actual supplier price.

Tip: install a price sensor (Zonneplan, Tibber, Nord Pool) for exact prices.
info.chart_estimated:
Chart shows estimated consumer prices.

Calculation:
  wholesale market (per 15 min)
+ Energy tax & surcharges
+ Fixed supplier markup
+ VAT
= Consumer price

No crowdsource data available yet. Relative price differences between hours are correct â exact amounts may differ.

Tip: install a price sensor for exact prices, or wait for community data to become available.
info.supplier: Toimittajan valinta parantaa hintojen tarkkuutta. Sovellus soveltaa tuntikohtaista korjausta ENTSO-E-tukkuhinnan ja todellisen toimittajahinnan vÃĊlisen eron perusteella. TÃĊmÃĊ kalibroi kaavion ja hintaerittelyn vastaamaan todellista energialaskuasi.

VÃĊri:

🌿 Vihrein: 3 tunnin ikkuna, jolla on korkein uusiutuvan energian osuus tÃĊnÃĊÃĊn.
⚡🌿 Halpa & VihreÃĊ: tunnit, jotka ovat SEKÃ halvimmassa ETTÃ vihreimmÃĊssÃĊ ikkunassa.

TietolÃĊhde: Energy-Charts (Fraunhofer ISE), pÃĊivitetÃĊÃĊn 15 minuutin vÃĊlein.

KÃĊytÃĊ "VihreÃĊ Ikkuna" -automaatiomallia ajastaaksesi laitteet automaattisesti vihreimpien tuntien aikana.
